commit.subject: LU-15234 lnet: add mechanism for dumping lnd peer debug info
commit.message:
LU-15234 lnet: add mechanism for dumping lnd peer debug info

Add ability to dump peer debug info on lnd level:
	lnetctl debug peer --prim_nid=<nid>

The debug info is dumped to the log as D_CONSOLE and can be
retrieved with "lctl dk".
This mechanism hasbeen added for socklnd and o2iblnd peers.

Test-Parameters: fortestonly testlist=sanity-lnet
Signed-off-by: Serguei Smirnov <ssmirnov@whamcloud.com>
Change-Id: Ia9c4d59143206bcb7ec43806594cf0cfaed5f0a9
Signed-off-by: Gian-Carlo DeFazio <defazio1@llnl.gov>
